title: carduus cardunculus
intro: Carduus cardunculus, also known as the cardoon, is a perennial thistle plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of cardoon include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Cardoon can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
